title: crepidomanes humile
intro: Crepidomanes humile is a species of fern, specifically a type of epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the filmy ferns. Traditionally, Crepidomanes humile has been used in folk medicine in various parts of the world, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and potentially exerting antioxidant effects. Crepidomanes humile is often prepared as a tea or decoction to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and safety.
